'''Raed-7''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]<ref name="TEA" /> that traded with its neighbor, [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]].<ref name="The Desperate Mission" />

{{Planet-stub}}
